# Test GitHub server error handling with invalid token
env GITHUB_TOKEN=invalid_token
exec go run . --timeout=10s
stdin error_request.json
wait 10s
stdout '"result"'
stdout '"isError"'

-- error_request.json --
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_repository","arguments":{"owner":"nonexistent","repo":"nonexistent"}}}
